description: A horizontal (landscape) designed announcement card on a solid medium-blue background. In the upper area, centered-left, is white serif headline text reading 'DHS Will Now Restrict Goods from Over 100 PRC-Based Companies from Entering the United States Due to Forced Labor Practices'. To the upper-right is the circular U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (white line art of the eagle with shield, ringed by the words 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'). A thin red horizontal rule divides the upper text from the lower portion. The bottom half features large bold white/light sans-serif caps reading 'PRESS RELEASE' with a subtle drop shadow. The design is clean, official, and minimalist - standard DHS branded press-release template. This is a policy-announcement graphic (Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act enforcement) rather than an immigration meme; the messaging projects governmental action against forced labor imports from China, targeting press/policy audiences. Designed agency graphic.
notable_text: DHS Will Now Restrict Goods from Over 100 PRC-Based Companies from Entering the United States Due to Forced Labor Practices. PRESS RELEASE.
